commit.subject: LU-13224 utils: insignificant changes to compare tests.
commit.message:
LU-13224 utils: insignificant changes to compare tests.

A patch almost identical to master to compare
test results with a patch that is consistently
failing, but in an inconsistent way.

Signed-off-by: Gian-Carlo DeFazio <defazio1@llnl.gov>
Change-Id: I201f1f3ca4c2e69167573a7b91248de3fe364e87
